newsSinceJun6: No new fundamental news. Stock fell ~4% on June 9 (to $347.35) as investors digested insider-sale filings (Director Ernst Csiszar sold 6,500 shares / $2.41M on June 5; ~$3.5M insider sales over 3 months with no purchases) and valuation concerns (GuruFocus flags shares as heavily overvalued vs GF Value) after the strong post-analyst-day run. Underlying demand signals intact: record $20.3B backlog (+28% YoY), bullish analyst actions post NYC analyst day with 2028 growth targets. Move is flow/valuation-driven, not thesis-changing.

sources.label: Quiver Quantitative - MasTec shares fall as investors digest insider-sale filings and pullback
Investing.com - MasTec director Ernst Csiszar sells $2.41M in stock (June 5, 2026)
Simply Wall St - MasTec valuation in focus after overvaluation concerns, insider selling, grid/data-center tailwinds
GuruFocus - MasTec shares fall 4.3%, GF Value says still overvalued

verdicts.rankRationale: Yesterday's verdict already pushed MTZ down for the post-rerating chase; today's -4% pullback is flow-driven (insider-sale filings, valuation noise) with the grid/fiber/power bottleneck thesis fully intact, modestly restoring asymmetry. No genuinely new fundamental evidence since June 6, so hold at rank 74 with a small positive drift.
verdicts.bull: Record $20.3B backlog (+28% YoY) and analyst-day 2028 targets confirm MasTec sits on the grid, fiber and data-center power buildout critical path; a 4% valuation-driven dip improves entry without thesis damage.
verdicts.neutral: Broad cyclical infrastructure contractor, not a pure AI bottleneck; +52.6% YTD already prices much of the AI campus power/connectivity narrative, and insider selling caps near-term sentiment.
verdicts.bear: GF Value flags shares as substantially overvalued; if data-center capex or renewable interconnect spending decelerates, a high-multiple, margin-thin contractor de-rates hard with insiders already selling into strength.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: New grid/data-center power or fiber contract awards and continued backlog growth toward analyst-day 2028 targets.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Post-rerating multiple compression: +52.6% YTD with insider selling and overvaluation flags leaves little residual alpha if AI infrastructure capex momentum stalls.
